---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] - Brief description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description

Clearly describe the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Vertical/Demo Affected

Which vertical should have this feature?

## 🤔 Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## 📋 Requirements

What should the feature do?
- Requirement 1
- Requirement 2
- Requirement 3

## 📊 Impact

- **Users Affected:** Customers / Internal / Both
- **Business Value:** High / Medium / Low
- **Implementation Complexity:** Easy / Medium / Hard

## 🎨 Possible Solution

How do you think this could be implemented?

## 🔄 Similar Features

Are there similar features in other verticals?

## 📸 Mockups/Examples

Add mockups, diagrams, or screenshots if helpful.

## ❓ Additional Context

Any other information?

---

**Feature Requests Drive Our Roadmap!** 🚀
